$comment: Claude Code settings.json for package install guardrails.
Place this in .claude/settings.json (project-level, shared via git),
1. PreToolUse hook — validates packages against OSV.dev + registry age
2. Permission deny rules — blocks dangerous command patterns outright
3. Permission ask rules — requires user approval for risky operations

hooks.if: Bash(npm install *) || Bash(npm i *) || Bash(npm add *) || Bash(npx *) || Bash(yarn add *) || Bash(yarn install *) || Bash(pnpm add *) || Bash(pnpm install *) || Bash(pnpm i *) || Bash(bun add *) || Bash(bun install *) || Bash(bun i *) || Bash(pip install *) || Bash(pip3 install *) || Bash(uv pip install *) || Bash(uv add *) || Bash(cargo add *) || Bash(cargo install *) || Bash(go get *) || Bash(go install *) || Bash(gem install *) || Bash(composer require *) || Bash(nix-env *) || Bash(nix profile install *)
hooks.statusMessage: Checking package safety against vulnerability databases...
